meta.title: How to use Google's MusicLM in your daily journal
meta.description:
In this video, we're going to try out Google's MusicLM, where we can write a text and it generates music for us – a prompt-to-music system. If you want to give it a shot yourself, head over to:
Google MusicLM
https://aitestkitchen.withgoogle.com/
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

00:00 Intro
01:00 Ringtone to Waking up
01:39 Gym Music
02:17 Office Music
03:12 Shopping Music
04:05 Romantic Dinner
04:40 A.I. Dj
05:40 Music to sleep
06:11 Outro
